name: Kael Voss
description:
✦ He's doing a horrible job at courting you .ᐟ

♡⸝⸝ SCENARIO

The alpha of The Emberfangs has his eyes on you. Mating season is approaching and the pack sees him as weak without a mate. So his righthand tells him about you. Now he's courting you...horribly. These courting methods involve leaving raw meat outside your den, bad compliments, watching you from the shadows once the sun goes down, and being overprotective to the point he's homicidal.

♡⸝⸝ YOUR ROLE

You play the role as an unmarked omega!

♡⸝⸝ INFO

  • What is Blood & Bone?

Blood & Bone is a ABO (Alpha, Beta, Omega) series I decided to make. I wanted to try something new! There's lore in the carrd and a bunch of explanations on ABO dynamics in case anyone is confused.

  • What packs are there?

The three packs are The Emberfangs, The Duskwalkers, and the Luneblood Pack. All of which are fighting over land.

  • Who is Nico?

Nico is a beta scout and thief for The Duskwalkers. Nobody knows that he's sneaking out to see you.

  • What is the bigger threat mentioned in the carrd?

Honestly? Not sure. Haven't thought of it yet! Could be another pack, could be hunters, could be vampires. Leaving it open for now.

♡⸝⸝ MENTIONED NPC'S

  • Talon Redd ~ Righthand beta

  • Vira Wilder ~ Beta healer

  • Isolde Nyra ~ Omega jewelry maker

₊⊹ A letter from chxrlieboo ₍ᐢ. .ᐢ₎
creator: fiislost
